title: Martial Arts Master / Master of Teras Kasi talent cleanup

scope.requestedByUser: Teras Kasi along with the Martial Arts Master trees; include the virtual Unarmed Strike surface and natural weapons for all unarmed-family effects.
treeNames: Awareness (reviewed as the second Martial Arts Master class tree; no new unsafe rows found in this pass)
scope.naturalWeaponPolicy: For this cleanup pass, species natural weapons count as unarmed-family attacks for unarmed strike feat/talent improvements. This matches the user's provided FAQ/TLDR direction and avoids leaving claw/bite/talon weapons behind when a rule says it improves unarmed attacks.

implementedContextual.name: Teräs Käsi Basics
implementedContextual.notes: Removed the unsafe migrated +2 melee attack row. The talent now adds one extra weapon die to virtual Unarmed Strike and species natural weapon damage. The duplicate Teras/Teräs compendium rows share a highest-stacking key so accidental duplicate ownership does not double-count the extra die.

implementedContextual.name: Teras Kasi Basics
implementedContextual.notes: Kept the duplicate spelling variant because this pass does not delete compendium documents. Runtime stacking is guarded by stackingKey=teras-kasi-basics-extra-die.

implementedContextual.name: Ignore Damage Reduction
implementedContextual.notes: DamageReductionResolver now supports attacker-owned rules that ignore DR when post-SR unarmed/natural weapon damage exceeds the target's DR value. This requires the damage packet to carry sourceActor and weapon context.

combatActionCards.name: Unarmed Parry
combatActionCards.notes: Reaction timing, Fight Defensively state, incoming melee attack roll, awareness, flat-footed state, and cumulative -2 parry penalties are manual context. The old +2 melee attack row was removed.

combatActionCards.name: Unarmed Counterstrike
combatActionCards.notes: Triggered by a successful Unarmed Parry. Surfaced as a manual reaction card and tells the player to use virtual Unarmed Strike or a natural weapon against the parried attacker.

combatActionCards.name: Teras Kasi Mastery
combatActionCards.notes: Adds a standard-action reference card for unarmed/natural-weapon-only Full Attack. Full automation should be delegated to the FullAttackExecutor workstream.

runtimeNotes: CombatOptionResolver now treats flags.swse.isNaturalWeapon, system.naturalWeapon/system.isNaturalWeapon, species-natural-weapon source, and common claw/bite/talon/etc text as unarmed-family weapons for unarmed rules.

UnarmedAttackHelper now folds unarmed-family extra weapon dice into the virtual Unarmed Strike display/roll surface and flags those dice as already applied so CombatOptionResolver does not add them again for the virtual weapon.
CombatOptionResolver now avoids double-applying Martial Arts die-step rules to the virtual Unarmed Strike because UnarmedAttackHelper already builds that damage into the virtual weapon.
Real species natural weapon items still receive Martial Arts die-step and Teras Kasi extra-die improvements through CombatOptionResolver at roll time.

smokeTests: DamageReductionResolver bypasses DR for a source actor with Ignore Damage Reduction when natural weapon damage exceeds DR, and does not bypass when damage does not exceed DR.

remainingLimitations: Unarmed Parry and Unarmed Counterstrike remain manual reaction cards because the system does not yet have a reaction sequence executor that can compare the parry roll to the incoming attack roll and automatically negate the attack.
Teras Kasi Mastery is prepared for the FullAttackExecutor but remains a manual standard-action launcher/reference until that executor exists.
Ignore Damage Reduction needs attack damage application callers to preserve sourceActor and weapon context when applying damage; the resolver support is now present.

nextRecommendedBatch.reason: These adjacent unarmed/martial trees share the same virtual Unarmed Strike and natural weapon surface and should be audited after Master of Teras Kasi.
